mapper.sql: id, title, total_score, created_time, updated_time, is_deleted, timer_mode, prep_seconds, total_seconds, auto_submit, allow_pause
mapper.select: select from reading_test where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select rt.id, rt.title, rt.total_score, rt.created_time, rt.updated_time, rt.is_deleted, rt.timer_mode, rt.prep_seconds, rt.total_seconds, rt.auto_submit, rt.allow_pause, ( select count(1) from reading_passage rp where rp.test_id = rt.id and rp.is_deleted = 0 ) as tasks, ( select count(1) from reading_passage rp join reading_question rq on rq.passage_id = rp.id where rp.test_id = rt.id and rp.is_deleted = 0 and rq.is_deleted = 0 ) as questions from reading_test rt where rt.is_deleted = 0 order by id desc
select from reading_test where is_deleted = 1 order by id desc
select from reading_test order by id desc
mapper.update: update reading_test set title = #{title}, total_score = #{totalScore}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, timer_mode = #{timerMode}, prep_seconds = #{prepSeconds}, total_seconds = #{totalSeconds}, auto_submit = #{autoSubmit}, allow_pause = #{allowPause} where id = #{id}
update reading_test set is_deleted = 1, updated_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update reading_test set is_deleted = 0, updated_time = NOW() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
